message:
test(render): E2E Roaring vs Vec<bool> dirty tracking equivalence (bd-22wk8.4)

Add integration test validating that RoaringBitmap-based dirty tracking
produces identical diff output to the existing Vec<bool>/Vec<u8> approach.

5 tests across 4 terminal sizes (80x24 to 400x100) and 6 scenarios:
- sparse edits, dense row edits, alternating rows, single cell,
  full screen, empty dirty
- Multi-frame incremental simulation (initial, type, scroll, idle)
- Union/intersection correctness for composing dirty sets
- JSONL schema compliance for structured logging

All frames verified: diff_match=true, roaring_superset=true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
